language.title: App language
language.description: Choose the language to use in the app.

categories.homeTitle: What kind of event is it?
categories.homeDescription: Talk with fans on site in real time.

eventDay.title: Concert/Fancon
eventDay.description: Handle venue rounds, waiting, entry, viewing, and exit in one place.

popup.title: Popup/Exhibition
popup.description: Handle reservations, waiting, entry, merch purchases, and trades in one place.

cafeEvent.title: Birthday Cafe/Event
cafeEvent.description: Plan routes, first-come benefits, viewing, and giveaways in one place.

actions.checklistDescription: Check what to bring and save it as an image.
actions.cafeRoutesDescription: Choose cafes by benefit preference and save your route.
actions.roomsDescription: Share real-time updates with fans on site.

landing.title: Light and reliable
landing.description: Pack what you need and share on-site info in real time.

conditions.sectionDescription: Choose the expected conditions on event day.

checklist.localSavedRetrySync: Local changes were saved. Please sync again.

auth.description: Only logged-in users can enter event chat rooms and save to their account.
auth.previewNotice: Supabase is not configured, so local preview login is being used.
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Log in
auth.confirmEmailBeforeLogin: Complete the confirmation email before logging in.

rooms.tutorialFallbackNotice: We could not load chat rooms for a moment, so we are showing the tutorial room.
rooms.createdInactiveNotice: This chat room appears in today's chat rooms from {{beforeCount}} days before the event until {{afterCount}} days after.
rooms.eventUrlPlaceholder: Official notice, ticket, or guide link
rooms.emptyTitle: No rooms have been created yet.
rooms.emptyDescription: Create the first room to collect on-site info.
rooms.tutorialRoomDescription: Today Duck will show you how to use chat rooms.
rooms.chatRoomDescription: On site now? Share real-time updates.

welcomeBodies: This is a chat room where you can freely share on-site updates.
replyBodies: Share only on-site information you have checked.
When things are urgent, short and clear updates work best.
Before posting photos or locations, check that no personal information is visible.
Ask questions freely, and answer what you know with care.

preview.noAutoInfo: No information could be loaded automatically. Please enter the title, date, and place manually.
preview.confirmLoadedInfo: Please check that the loaded information is accurate. You can edit it if needed.

rooms.activeWindow: Chat rooms can only be created from {{beforeCount}} days before the event until {{afterCount}} days after.

searchErrors.loginRequired: Log in is required to search places.
searchErrors.missingKakaoKey: The Kakao REST API key is not set in Supabase.
searchErrors.functionNotDeployed: The place search server function is not deployed.
searchErrors.rateLimited: Too many place search requests. Please try again later.
searchErrors.serverConfig: Please check the place search server settings.
searchErrors.kakaoRequestFailed: The Kakao place search request failed.
searchErrors.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the place search server.

cafeRoutes.unavailableCategory: This is only available for birthday cafe categories.
cafeRoutes.title: Birthday cafe route
cafeRoutes.description: Choose cafes by benefit preference and save your route.
cafeRoutes.emptyDescription: Create your first visit route based on birthday cafe benefits.
cafeRoutes.addCafeDescription: Selected places appear as markers on the map.
cafeRoutes.roomLinkDescription: Only shareable routes can be linked to birthday cafe chat rooms.
cafeRoutes.loadingRooms: Loading chat rooms that can be linked.
cafeRoutes.noLinkableRooms: There are no birthday cafe chat rooms available to link.
cafeRoutes.policyText: Routes are created in your personal category, and only shareable routes can be linked to chat rooms. When a chat room ends, shared records inside the room are no longer shown, but saved route copies remain in your account.
cafeRoutes.roomStatusCheckFailed: Could not check chat room status

shareCard.prepareFailed: Could not prepare the share card.
shareCard.photoPermissionMessage: Allow permission to save the share card to your photo library.
shareCard.loadFailed: Could not load the share card.

myPage.title: My Page
myPage.guestDescription: Log in to view saved checklists and chat rooms you joined.

OUTDOOR_WAITING.label: Outdoor waiting
OUTDOOR_WAITING.description: You may need to queue outside, so prepare for wind, sun, or cold.

LONG_WAIT.label: Long wait
LONG_WAIT.description: Expected wait of 60+ minutes. Plan for stamina, battery, water, and snacks.

STANDING.label: Standing
STANDING.description: Entry and viewing may involve standing. Pack light and wear comfortable shoes.

RAIN.label: Rain or snow
RAIN.description: Bring an umbrella, raincoat, and waterproof protection.

SUMMER.label: Summer heat
SUMMER.description: Prepare for heat, sweat, makeup smudging, portable fans, and sun protection.

WINTER.label: Winter cold
WINTER.description: Hand warmers, insulation, and layering are recommended.

GIVEAWAY.label: Giveaway or trade
GIVEAWAY.description: Bring extra bags, packaging, sleeves, labels, and pens.

FOREIGN.label: International fan
FOREIGN.description: Prepare local maps and basic phrases for greetings, orders, and simple communication.

concert_basic.title: Concert/Fancon Basic Checklist
concert_basic.description: A baseline checklist for entry, viewing, and waiting situations.

ticket_qr.name: Reservation details/ticket or QR
ticket_qr.tip: Save a screenshot as backup so you can access it offline if the network is unstable.

id_card.name: Photo ID
id_card.tip: Needed for identity checks, on-site pickup, and similar checks.

phone.name: Phone
phone.tip: Used for entry, contact, maps, and photos. Battery management is essential.

battery.name: Portable battery
battery.tip: Queues, entry, and photo/video shooting can drain your battery quickly.

cable.name: Charging cable
cable.tip: Bring the cable that fits your phone and portable battery.

transport_card.name: Transit card or transit app
transport_card.tip: Check last trains and transfer routes in advance.

payment.name: Payment method: card and a little cash
payment.tip: Needed for merch, meals, convenience stores, and transit. Keep small cash for emergencies.

lightstick.name: Lightstick and batteries if needed
lightstick.tip: Check the battery type, such as AAA, or charge it in advance.

small_bag.name: Light bag: crossbody or mini bag
small_bag.tip: Depends on venue rules. Keep valuables and essentials only.

water.name: Water or drink
water.tip: Helps during long waits. Check venue carry-in rules.

snack.name: Small snack
snack.tip: Helpful when your energy drops. Choose compact snacks.

wet_tissue.name: Wet wipes or tissues
wet_tissue.tip: Useful for hands, spills, sweat, and general cleanup.

hand_sanitizer.name: Hand sanitizer
hand_sanitizer.tip: Helps with hygiene and keeps things feeling clean.

comfortable_shoes.name: Comfortable shoes or insoles
comfortable_shoes.tip: Prepares you for all-day queues, waiting, and walking.

zip_bag.name: Small zip bag
zip_bag.tip: Keeps receipts, chargers, and small merch organized and protected from water.

portable_fan.name: Portable fan, cooling wipes, or parasol
portable_fan.tip: Especially important in summer or outdoor waiting.

hand_warmers.name: Hand warmers or heat packs
hand_warmers.tip: Especially important in winter or outdoor waiting.

giveaway_pack.name: Packaging for giveaways or trades: sleeves/bags

popup_store_basic.title: Popup/Exhibition Basic Checklist
popup_store_basic.description: Focused on reservations, purchases, queues, and merch protection.

reservation_qr.name: Reservation/entry QR or guide message
reservation_qr.tip: Save a screenshot and keep the message or email easy to find.

id_card.name: Photo ID
id_card.tip: Needed for identity checks, on-site pickup, age checks, and similar checks.

payment.name: Payment method: card and a little cash
payment.tip: Needed for merch, meals, convenience stores, and transit. Keep small cash for emergencies.

card_sleeves.name: Photo card sleeves or protective film

wet_tissue.name: Wet wipes or tissues
wet_tissue.tip: Useful for hands, spills, sweat, and general cleanup.

hand_sanitizer.name: Hand sanitizer
hand_sanitizer.tip: Helps with hygiene and keeps things feeling clean.

battery.name: Portable battery
battery.tip: Queues, entry, and photo/video shooting can drain your battery quickly.

cable.name: Charging cable
cable.tip: Bring the cable that fits your phone and portable battery.

comfortable_shoes.tip: Prepares you for all-day queues, waiting, and walking.

portable_fan.name: Portable fan, cooling wipes, or parasol

hand_warmers.name: Hand warmers or heat packs
hand_warmers.tip: Especially important in winter or outdoor waiting.

basic_phrase_card.name: Basic phrase memo: reservation, entry, payment
basic_phrase_card.tip: Examples: "I have a reservation," "Is this merch in stock?", "Can I pay by card?"

birthday_cafe_basic.title: Birthday Cafe Event Basic Checklist
birthday_cafe_basic.description: A template for cafe routes, merch storage, trades, and notes.

map_link.name: Saved map link or address
map_link.tip: Save it in the map app you prefer: Naver, Kakao, or Google.

payment.name: Payment method: card and a little cash
payment.tip: Needed for merch, meals, convenience stores, and transit. Keep small cash for emergencies.

tote_bag.name: Eco bag or shopping bag
tote_bag.tip: Useful for carrying benefits and merch.

mini_zipbags.name: Small zip bags
mini_zipbags.tip: Keeps receipts, chargers, and small merch organized and protected from water.

wet_tissue.name: Wet wipes or tissues
wet_tissue.tip: Useful for hands, spills, sweat, and general cleanup.

hand_sanitizer.name: Hand sanitizer
hand_sanitizer.tip: Helps with hygiene and keeps things feeling clean.

hand_warmers.name: Hand warmers or heat packs
hand_warmers.tip: Especially important in winter or outdoor waiting.

korean_order_phrase.name: Basic cafe order phrases: memo or image
korean_order_phrase.tip: Examples: "Iced, please," "Is takeout available?", "Where do I receive the benefit?"
